mapper.select: select count(a.id) from lkt_auction_special a left join lkt_mch m on a.mch_id = m.id
select count(distinct a.id) from lkt_auction_special a left join lkt_auction_session b on a.id=b.special_id and a.recovery=b.recovery,lkt_mch c
select count(distinct b.id) from lkt_product_list a,lkt_configure b,lkt_product_class c
select count(distinct a.id) from lkt_auction_special a
